ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the arrest */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person arrested */,
  "arrest_year" INTEGER /* Year of the arrest */,
  "arrest_month" TEXT /* Month of the arrest */,
  "perceived_race" TEXT /* Perceived race of the person arrested */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the person arrested */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the person at the time of arrest */,
  "youth_at_arrest" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the person was a youth at the time of arrest */,
  "arrest_loc_div" TEXT /* Division of the location where the arrest took place */,
  "strip_search" TEXT /* Indicator of whether a strip search was conducted */,
  "booked" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the person was booked */,
  "occurrence_category" INTEGER /* Category of the occurrence leading to the arrest */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the arrest */,
  "arrest_time" TEXT /* Time of the arrest */,
  "arrest_latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the arrest location */,
  "arrest_longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the arrest location */,
  "use_of_force" TEXT /* Indicator of whether force was used during the arrest */,
  "arrest_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the arrest (e.g., released, booked, charged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_occurrence_category FOREIGN KEY ("occurrence_category") REFERENCES occurrence_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_categories ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_perceived_race FOREIGN KEY ("perceived_race") REFERENCES racial_categories ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_youth_at_arrest FOREIGN KEY ("youth_at_arrest") REFERENCES youth_categories ("youth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_arrest_loc_div FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_loc_div") REFERENCES arrest_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "event_longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "number_of_people_involved" INTEGER /* Number of people involved in the event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the person */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the person */,
  "previous_arrests" INTEGER /* Number of previous arrests */,
  "known_aliases" TEXT /* Known aliases of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action record */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the actions */,
  "concealed_weapon" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a concealed weapon was involved */,
  "combative" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the person was combative */,
  "resisted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the person resisted arrest */,
  "mental_instability" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the person showed mental instability */,
  "assaulted_officer" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the officer was assaulted */,
  "cooperative" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the person was cooperative */,
  "use_of_taser" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a taser was used */,
  "use_of_pepper_spray" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether pepper spray was used */,
  "use_of_physical_force" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether physical force was used */,
  "duration_of_resistance" TEXT /* Duration of resistance (if any) */,
  "number_of_officers_involved" INTEGER /* Number of officers involved in the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_reasons" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search reason */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the search reasons */,
  "cause_injury" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the search was conducted due to causing injury */,
  "assist_escape" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the search was conducted to assist escape */,
  "possess_weapons" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the search was conducted due to possessing weapons */,
  "possess_evidence" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the search was conducted due to possessing evidence */,
  "search_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who conducted the search */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Time the search was conducted */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location where the search was conducted */,
  "search_warrant" TEXT /* Indicator of whether a search warrant was obtained */,
  "search_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the search (e.g., no items found, items found) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_reasons_search_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("search_conducted_by") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_reasons_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items_found" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item found */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the items found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item found */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item found */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item found (e.g., drug, weapon) */,
  "item_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item found */,
  "item_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the item found */,
  "item_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item found (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_found_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occurrence_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occurrence category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the occurrence category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occurrence category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "is_high_crime_area" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the location is in a high-crime area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  "is_ethnic" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the category is an ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_categories" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "is_binary" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the category is binary (male/female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "youth_categories" (
  "youth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each youth category */,
  "youth_name" TEXT /* Name of the youth category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the youth category */,
  "age_limit" INTEGER /* Age limit for the youth category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("youth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_records" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking record */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges associated with the booking */,
  "booking_location" TEXT /* Location where the booking took place */,
  "booking_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who processed the booking */,
  "booking_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the booking (e.g., detained, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_records_booking_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_records_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer filing the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was filed */,
  "report_location" TEXT /* Location where the report was filed */,
  "report_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the report (e.g., closed, under investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years of service */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the officer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)
